mealplan_search_recipes_placeholder: Search recipes or type a dinner…
mealplan_search_recipes_aria: Search recipes or type a custom dinner
mealplan_no_freezer_matches_desc: Clear the search or category filter.
mealplan_no_recipes_found_desc: Try a different search or category.
mealplan_source_toggle_aria: Switch {dinner} between cooking fresh and serving from the freezer
mealplan_toast_no_frozen_portions: No frozen portions of {dinner} left — freezer stock was not changed.
mealplan_toast_consumed_last: Took the last {count} from the freezer
mealplan_consume_desc_suffix: came out of the freezer? ({count} stocked)
mealplan_consume_toast_failed: Could not update the freezer stock.
recipes_search_aria: Search recipes by name or ingredient
recipes_empty_found_desc: Try another class, dish type, toggle, or search term.
recipes_empty_yet_desc: Import a recipe URL to start the cookbook.
recipes_translation_paused_budget: Translation paused — daily AI budget reached. Try again tomorrow.
recipes_confirm_leave_timer: You have an active timer — leave anyway?
recipes_confirm_reset_cook_progress: Start this recipe over and clear its timers?
recipes_ai_roles_prefill: Classify the ingredients for {title} as cook-in or serve-fresh
recipes_meal_add_sheet_title: Add a recipe to this meal
recipes_source_snapshot_imported: Original imported recipe. This stays unchanged while the working recipe improves.
recipes_source_snapshot_legacy: Original saved baseline. This snapshot was created when source history was introduced.
cookmode_swap_session_hint: Use a saved alternative for this cooking session.
cookmode_swap_save_failed: Could not update the recipe default
recipes_addplan_toast_failed: Could not add to meal plan ({status}).
recipes_addplan_toast_failed_generic: Could not add to meal plan.
recipes_freezer_invalid_response: The saved target could not be confirmed. Try again.
recipes_import_reason_title: The title may need a check.
recipes_import_reason_ai_flagged: AI flagged this for a human check.
recipes_import_toast_clear_failed: Could not clear the review flag.
recipes_edit_directions_hint: Ingredient and method changes refresh the cooking view.
recipes_freeze_desc_suffix: to the freezer, linked to this recipe.
inventory_toast_out_cook_again: {name} is out — kept as a cook-again cue
inventory_toast_added_to_shopping: Added {name} to this week's shopping list
inventory_toast_add_shopping_failed: Could not add to shopping list
inventory_toast_undo_conflict: Item changed since then — flagged for review instead
inventory_addform_staple_label: Keep on hand — suggest when out
inventory_review_reason_undo_conflict: Changed since that action — undo skipped
inventory_editor_staple_label: Keep on hand — suggest when out
inventory_staples_add_aria: Add {name} to this week's shopping list
shopping_source_migration_read_only: You can view this week. Changes are paused while the new weekly list is prepared.
shopping_empty_no_meals_desc: Plan meals first and this list will fill itself from the recipes.
shopping_empty_nothing_desc: The planned recipes are covered by stock, or do not need shopping items.
shopping_toast_toggle_failed: Could not update the shopping item.
shopping_ah_not_connected_banner: Albert Heijn isn't connected — lists can't be sent to the AH app yet.
shopping_freezer_meals_banner: From the freezer: {names} — only their fresh sides are on this list.
shopping_freezer_missing_roles_banner: These freezer meals don't say what needs buying fresh yet — open the recipe to mark the fresh parts:
shopping_freezer_meals_summary: Only fresh sides are listed for these freezer meals.
shopping_ah_low_confidence: Not an exact name match -- check this is right.
shopping_ah_status_unknown: Could not search AH — will be sent as a free-text line.
shopping_ah_status_no_match: No product match — try another search word, or it goes as a free-text line.
shopping_ah_error_all_skipped: Everything is skipped — nothing to send.
shopping_toast_ah_push_failed: Could not send items to AH.
shopping_ah_not_connected_body: Not connected to Albert Heijn — nothing can be sent.
shopping_ah_connect_first: Connect the household AH account in Settings first, then try again.
shopping_pushhistory_pending_help: Wait, then check AH before trying again.
shopping_pushhistory_uncertain_help: AH may have received these items. Check AH before trying again.
shopping_toast_choice_failed: Could not save this grocery choice.
settings_advanced_vision_hint: Handles photo turns in chat. Must support image input.
settings_advanced_background_hint: Recipe ingest + translate — cheap, no chat-latency requirement.
settings_advanced_temperature_desc: Leave blank to use the model's own default. Lower is more focused; higher is more varied.
settings_advanced_env_knobs_desc: These stay env-only by design — infra or dangerous enough that a UI control isn't worth the risk. Set them where you deploy; see:
settings_advanced_pricing_desc_b: ) — fallback USD/M-token rates used only when a provider doesn't report its own cost. Rarely needed; see
settings_ai_household_profile_placeholde: Names, who cooks and shops, where you live.
settings_ai_household_profile_hint: The chat assistant reads this at the start of every conversation.
settings_ai_household_profile_save_faile: Could not save the household profile.
settings_ai_thinking_hint: Balanced is better for multi-step questions. Fast replies sooner for simple requests.
settings_ai_reply_route_hint: Auto is usually best. Fastest avoids slow routes; Cheapest favors lower-cost routes.
settings_ai_fallback_model_hint: Used when the chat model errors mid-turn.
settings_connections_ah_connected_desc: Shopping-list pushes go to the connected AH app account.
settings_connections_ah_disconnected_des: Connect Albert Heijn to send your shopping list straight to the AH app.
settings_connections_connect_intro: Connecting links this household's Albert Heijn account so shopping lists can be sent straight to the AH app.
settings_connections_step1_desc: In the project folder on your computer. A browser opens for the Albert Heijn login; when you're through, the token is copied to your clipboard.
settings_connections_step2_desc: The script already put it on your clipboard — one tap finishes the connection.
settings_connections_clipboard_blocked: Your browser blocked clipboard access — paste the token below instead.
settings_connections_clipboard_not_token: No token on the clipboard. Run the login script, then tap again — or paste it below.
settings_connections_connect_failed: Could not connect to Albert Heijn.
settings_data_import_desc: Restore recipes, inventory, and the meal plan/log from a previous export. Only works on an empty database.
settings_data_reset_desc: Permanently deletes the selected group. This cannot be undone.
settings_data_reset_confirm_body_singula: This permanently deletes {count} row from {label}. Type {label} to confirm.
settings_data_reset_confirm_body_plural: This permanently deletes {count} rows from {label}. Type {label} to confirm.
settings_recipes_autotranslate_hint: Translate new recipes to English right after import instead of waiting for the first English view. Counts against the background spend cap.
settings_recipes_normalize_hint: Separate preparation from ingredient names and add cooking, shopping, and scaling details. Uncertain changes wait for your review.
settings_recipes_normalize_counts: {remaining} left to improve · {review} waiting for review
settings_recipes_normalize_failed: Recipe improvement stopped. You can resume it here.
benchsheet_writing_hint_simple: Safe to leave — it keeps working in the background.
benchsheet_error_budget_reached: Daily AI budget reached. The cooking-view update is paused until tomorrow.
benchsheet_error_no_directions: This recipe has no directions to rewrite.
benchsheet_error_load_failed: Could not load the cooking view.
benchsheet_notif_primer_desc: Allow notifications so timers ring even if you swipe away briefly. Sound and vibration always work in the cook view.
benchsheet_cook_failed: Could not log this cook. Try again.
chat_attach_max_photos: Up to {max} photos at a time.
chat_attach_read_failed: Couldn't read that photo — try a clearer shot.
chat_empty_hint: Ask about meals, the freezer, or what to buy.
chat_cap_error: AI is paused for today (€0.50 daily limit reached). Try again tomorrow.
chat_cap_banner: AI daily limit reached (€0.50). Resets at midnight.
chat_tool_undo_conflict: Changed since — flagged for review instead
chat_confirm_expired_hydrated: Approval was requested — ask again to act on it
chat_error_connection_lost: Connection lost — check your internet and retry.
chat_error_empty_reply: The assistant didn't reply — try again.
chat_error_too_large: That was a lot at once — try splitting it into a couple of messages.
agent_open_aria: Open kitchen assistant. Use Arrow Up or Arrow Down to reposition.
recipes_roles_consequence: Incomplete roles can leave fresh sides off the shopping list.
recipes_edit_structure_review_hint: This form shows the proposed ingredient structure. Check the base names, preparation, optional items, and quantity rules before saving.
recipes_substitutes_disclaimer: Suggestions may be AI-generated and can change allergens, cooking time, texture, or doneness. Check the substitute and cook safely for your situation.
recipes_edit_substitute_note: When or how to use it (optional)
settings_mealplan_week_start_hint: Each planning week runs {from} through {to}. Tip: start the week on the day your groceries arrive, so you plan from delivery to delivery.
settings_mealplan_plan_ahead_hint: How many upcoming weeks the meal plan shows.
settings_mealplan_delivery_hint: Shown on the meal plan and the shopping list, so you know when to order and when new groceries arrive.
settings_mealplan_day_planning_hint: Off: each week is a flexible pool of meals — cook what fits the day. On: every meal can get its own day of the week.
settings_mealplan_repeat_cycle_hint: Suggestions skip recipes cooked within this window, so favorites rotate instead of repeating.
settings_mealplan_suggest_count_hint: How many meals one tap of Suggest asks for.
shopping_need_nice_to_have_desc: The recipe still works without it.
shopping_need_usually_stocked_desc: Keep this Dutch item off every list while it is in stock.
shopping_use_in_recipe_help: Save this Dutch name in the recipe. The old name stays available as an alternative.
shopping_bought_status: {name} moved to the basket. {count} items left to buy.
shopping_not_bought_status: {name} moved back to buy. {count} items left to buy.
shopping_legacy_help: This old list row has no safe recipe match. Choose where it belongs, keep it as a manual item, or dismiss it.
shopping_mutation_failed: The shopping list changed. Reload and try again.
recipe_enhance_empty: No new ideas found for this recipe.
recipe_enhance_stale: The recipe changed. Generate a new review before applying.
